description_long: This is a compact, rectangular stereo sound system device with a sleek black exterior and rounded edges. The front face features two gold-rimmed audio jacks, a smaller circular port, a green LED indicator, and a large black rotary knob with a red accent, suggesting a high-quality headphone amplifier or DAC. The top surface is smooth and unadorned except for a subtle 'FiiO' logo in the center. The rear side includes additional ports, likely for USB charging and line-in/out connections, flanked by two more small circular cutouts. The sides are minimalist, with only the edge of the rotary knob visible on one end. The overall design is modern and professional, suitable for portable or desktop audio use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, black rectangular stereo sound system with gold-rimmed audio jacks, a large rotary knob, and a subtle 'FiiO' logo. Its modern design features multiple ports and a smooth, minimalist finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows two gold-rimmed audio jacks, a smaller port, a green LED, and a large black rotary knob with a red accent, plus the 'FiiO' logo on top.
description_view_1: Side view displays the smooth, unadorned black surface with only the edge of the rotary knob visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a central USB port and two small circular cutouts, likely for additional connectivity.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a continuous, smooth black surface with no visible controls or ports.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'FiiO' logo is visible on the top center of the device in white text.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The front panel features two gold-rimmed audio jacks, a smaller circular port, a green LED indicator, and a large black rotary knob with a red accent. No additional buttons or sliders are visible.
